title: Rhynchelythrum ascendens
taxonomy: Rhynchelythrum ascendens is classified within the family of flowering plants, specifically as a member of the Acanthaceae family. This family is commonly known as the acanthus or thistle family. Rhynchelythrum ascendens is an endemic species, which means it is primarily found in a specific geographic region. The classification of Rhynchelythrum ascendens is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the division Angiospermophyta, and then the class Magnoliopsida.
